Determine SV subtype from INFO field

determine_sv_subtype.Rd

Classifies structural variants into specific subtypes based on the INFO field from VCF files. This function parses the INFO field to identify different types of structural variants including deletions (DEL), insertions (INS), inversions (INV), and their specific subtypes like complex rearrangements (COM), mobile element insertions (ME), and copy number variations (CNV).

Usage

determine_sv_subtype(info)

Arguments

info

Character string containing the INFO field from a VCF file

Value

Character string specifying the SV subtype classification
